series_metadata.series_description: Requests for Investigations are requests made for an outside agency (such as the State Highway Patrol, Auditor, etc.) to investigate a BWC employee. Included in the Request for Investigation are the actual request, referrals, preliminary investigation documents, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain these records for 1 year after the completion of the investigation or decision not to investigate, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain these records for 1 year after the completion of the investigation or decision not to investigate, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
